name: MasterKodi AI Subs
changelog: Subtitle rows: concise, key-info-first labels (match% · provider · SDH · release) with language label (renders in a line like DarkSubs, no long scroll). Episode fix: series now strongly prefer the EXACT episode and push season packs to the bottom (match.rank_candidates) -- fixes picking a whole-season subdl pack. Removed baked keys (the supplied AQ. values are OAuth tokens, not API keys -> 401).
